problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
